Notice Of Motion And Motion Re Written Discovery And Related Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff GUSTAVE W. LINK, Tel No. 510-754-9628 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court determines that Mr. Link did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HENDRIK STRYDON'S Motion Re Written Discovery And Related Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff is granted. Mr. Link shall serve complete code complaint responses within 20 days. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $490. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
